title: TAP Agar Plates
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6daoh","text":"Tris-Acetate-Phosphate medium (TAP) is among the most common for Chlamydomonas reinhardtii. This protocol uses premade TAP from ThermoFisher. Alternative and significantly cheaper TAP medium can be found at PhytoTechnology. Agar is from Acros.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":128,"length":12},{"key":1,"offset":207,"length":15}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"9B2424DC27794DEEA7DD094D3BAC5C35","url":"https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/A1379801"}},"1":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"B983303716AC443B9386ADF71275F8C6","url":"http://phytotechlab.com/index.php/tris-acetate-phosphate-tap.html"}}}}
steps: Pour 500mL of premade TAP into 1L erlenmeyer undetermined
Agar is added to TAP at 15g per liter. For 500mL, add 7.5g of agar undetermined
Cover the lid with aluminum foil, autoclave tape, and autoclave in a liquid cycle for 90 minutes 01:30:00
